title: Overview
text:
What


A weekend away. Leave on Saturday - Have fun - Eventually return home of Sunday.


Current Scheme

Saturday


Pottery before lunch.


Got out for lunch.


‘Check-in’ to accomodation.


Beach afternoon.


Head back to accommodation and either get ready to go out for dinner or settle in and order food in.


Drinks / Games / Dancing


Sunday


Lazy morning! Sleep in and relax.


Eventually go out to brunch.


Eventually head home.







Where


Sunshine Coast. Close enough that it isn’t annoying to get to and get home but far enough that it is a change in environment.





When


End of October - beginning November. Hopefully enough time to plan and budget but not too close to the End of year / Christmas chaos.


Let’s create a weekend playlist
Sometimes finding the right music can be stressful (well, it is for me) so why not push everyone else into creating a playlist that combines all our music.
Everyone wins, right?
Add songs to the playlist

title: Food
text:
This page will be about Food.
Where we eat will probably depend on where the accommodation is located.

title: Accommodation
text:
Entire townhouse in Maroochydore, Australia



BRAND NEW REVERSE AC. Located in the Heart of Cotton Trees only 3 BLKS to Beach+River.TRENDY area with Cool Restaurants,Bakeries,Shops+Bike trails.Good Dogs welcome.Unique rental with EVERYTHING provided-1000 count Sheets,Towels, Unlimited Internet,International+Local calls,BBQ, Beach items, 2 Paddle Boards with wheels to walk them down to river.This 2 bed, 2 bath HM sleeps 6+is set up to feel like a second HM. Designed with great outdoor living,even amazing outdoor surfboard shower.
The space
Good Dogs are allowed with prior approval and a dog deposit. Brand new total renovation designed with all the latest trends and comforts of home - nothing spared. This is a unique rental normally only found overseas - EVERYTHING is provided from the 1000 count sheets, towels, unlimited internet, international and local calls, and large hooded BBQ, to all the beach items you need! 2 Paddle Boards with wheels to walk them down to the river are available for guest use but you will be required to follow printed directions for cleaning and putting them away as per our book.
This 2 bedroom, 2 bath home sleeps 6 and is set up to feel like a second home. Designed with great outdoor living, this gorgeous Beach Home boasts a huge wrap around deck with room to seat 12 around the outdoor extension table, with a BBQ provided for your use, large square Umbrella for welcome shade and an amazing outdoor surfboard shower with hot and cold water to wash off the salt water in style.
Contemporary kitchen is fully equipped with everything a gourmet chef requires - lit appliance cupboard stores every appliance you will need; with a huge Chefs 5 burner free standing oven and cooktop, French-style fridge with ice maker and water dispenser, dishwasher, microwave and a large pantry with the food basics. An open and bright neutral palette with Australian Spotted gum hardwood floors, Australian contemporary lighting style to feel like a beach home, this open floor plan is great to chill and hang with the family.
Relax in the comfortable family room with plenty of comfy seating on the 3 person contemporary couch, 2 chairs and 2 ottomans for extras eating, 52” smart TV with DVD for your use. You’ll love the master bedroom with luxury pillow top queen mattress, snuggle into the 1000 count sheets and feather pillows from the USA. You can relax in bed listening to the birds or catch the news on the 40” smart TV, or sip on your morning coffee in the sunshine on your private deck.
Storage is never a problem with lots of closet space with wooden hangers and 6 draw cabinet for extra room. The children’s room is set up with 2 twin beds both with an easy slide out trundle bed; the kids also have luxury pillow top mattresses, 1000 count sheets, quilts and summer blankets.
Relax and unwind in the stunning upper bathroom in a deep soaking tub with a contemporary 2 sink vanity. In summer we LOVE the Second “bath” which is an outdoor shower, we actually use it more than the tub! The kids love coming home and showering before they go inside! There is an additional toilet on the main level. A covered carport in front makes it easy to bring in the groceries with a locked storage area for your bikes. Close to everything - surf Maroochydore beach, paddle at the beautiful calm river, and enjoy the wonderful bakery and butcher just around the corner at Cotton Trees. Shop at the Sunshine Plaza, dine at all the Trendy Restaurants or ride the bike trails all the way to Mooloolabah. My family has lived here for 50+ years and still have their own units in our complex and I grew up making wonderful beach memories - we hope you do too!
Only 1 hour from Brisbane and Brisbane airport, 20mins to Australia Zoo, 20mins to Montville and Maleny, 20 mins to Noosa, 10 mins to Sealife Underwater world, 5 mins to Sunshine Plaza. Visit Ettamogah Pub, Aussie World Theme Park, Big Kart Track, Scuba Diving and Deep Sea fishing trips from Mooloolaba, Play Golf, lawn bowls and ten pin bowling at Alex.
Enjoy this unique experience, unlike any other rental - this was created to feel like a home. Our home. Come share it with us!
You will be able to utilize everything in the home, we only ask if something runs out that you replace it for the next guest.
My family has beach homes in the complex and may be available if you need something.
Maroochydore is, in many ways, the heart of the Sunshine Coast. Maroochydore is best known for its sensational beaches, river precinct, shopping, entertainment and recreational facilities. A long walking track runs from Sunshine Plaza to Cotton Tree and through Alexandra Headland, right up to Mooloolaba, and is always pulsing with people strolling, jogging and cycling along the waterfront.
The kids will spend many happy days at Maroochydore’s perfect beaches. Sunshine Plaza is the Sunshine Coast’s largest shopping mall, and has a large cinema complex, fashion boutiques, department stores and food courts. Maroochydore also offers nightlife with trendy bars and the various Surf Lifesaving Clubs always full of life. When you want to wind down, float on the gentle Maroochydore river current for endless carefree hours, taking time to see the birdlife and coastal eco-system. For things to see and do in Maroochydore, start at the Maroochydore River mouth and try some fishing, stand up paddle boarding or make your way around to the white sands of Maroochydore Beach. Play beach cricket before swimming at the protected beach and grabbing a family meal at the RSL. A few minutes away there’s Top Shots fun park, with mini-golf and watersides.
At Sunshine Plaza there’s the cinema complex with all the latest films, and a shopping mall to satisfy any food or retail desire. Some of Maroochydore’s diverse food and restaurant options include Stillwater for its genuine Japanese dishes, or Ebb for its classy seafood and gourmet meals.
We are located only 1 hour from Brisbane and Brisbane airport, 20mins to Australia Zoo, 20mins to Montville and Maleny, 20 mins to Noosa, 10 mins to Sealife Underwater world, 5 mins to Sunshine Plaza. Visit Ettamogah Pub, Aussie World Theme Park, Big Kart Track, Scuba Diving and Deep Sea fishing trips from Mooloolaba, Play Golf, lawn bowls and ten pin bowling at Alex.
Bring your car or ride your bike! Miles of bike trails along the entire coast!
My Family has owned the land for over 55years and I grew up going to our Beach House every summer walking around to the bakery to get our morning bread and treat! In 1994 we decided to buy an additional lot and develop ‘The Paper Barks’ so that we could all have our own units. I wanted my kids to experience the simple and fun lifestyle Cotton Trees has to offer so this year we decided to convert my property to a vacation rental. We use is every Christmas and New Year for a month. My Family still owns 4 in the complex that they use regularly.
Guest access whole house is for rent

title: Pottery
text:
This is a brief overview of some of the classes available at the Sunshine Coast.


Syndicate Creative



Private Hand Building Group Workshop





Duration


90 minutes




Cost


$85.00/person





Our Private Hand Building Group Workshops are the perfect workshop for Anniversaries, Birthdays, Work Gatherings or if you just want to learn pottery with your friends!
Get your hands stuck into some clay and have a laugh while you create!
Students will be guided to create their own personalised hug mug!
This workshop is perfect for those who want to start small with a single workshop over 90 minutes to create with clay. Your pieces will then be glazed and fired by us and ready for collection around 3 weeks later.
Our Private Group Single sessions include all materials, firings and glazes.
Are you a beginner? Don’t Fret because our teachers are here to guide you and we want to help you to create something that you can keep forever!





The Clay Shed



Make a Mug





Duration


2 hours




Cost


$90.00/person







Make and decorate your very own mug using easy hand building techniques you can repeat at home! We supply the clay and tools, just bring yourself and some enthusiasm.


Decorate your mug with our selection of coloured slips and texturing tools. Plenty of instruction and guidance to ensure you end up with a functional piece you can be proud of.


We will then clear glaze and fire your mug (we will contact you when your mug is ready to be taken home and put to use).


Taught by Stephen Roberts who holds more than 30 years experience as a full time potter, production potter and teacher of pottery.





The Pottery Studio



Clay & Wine Class





Duration


2 hours




Cost


$100.00/person





Looking for the perfect way to chill out and get creative? Say hello to Clay & Wine - your new fave way to sip, sculpt, and unwind for 2 beautiful hours of creativity!
Bring your favourite drinks and snacks, pick a project that speaks to you, and get handsy with some clay in a super relaxed, beginner-friendly space. No pressure, no rules - just good vibes, good company, and your own little masterpiece in the making.
👐 Choose your own project
🎨 Learn hand-building techniques
🍷 BYO drinks + snacks
🔥 FREE Glazing Class (INCLUDED): You’ll receive a glazing CODE after your making session to use at checkout when booking your glazing class. (Come back in 2 weeks to finish your pieces! Please note you have 2 months to complete your glazing class)
That’s 2 classes for the price of 1. Come play!




Wheel Throwing Class





Duration


2 hours




Cost


$120.00/person





Ready to get your hands dirty and throw some clay around? Join us for a 2 hour crash course in wheel throwing. No experience needed, just a sense of fun.
In this hands-on session, you’ll learn how to center clay, shape a cup, and throw a bowl (or something bowl-ish - no pressure!). Our friendly facilitators will guide you every step of the way, then hand over the wheel so you can give it a whirl.
🍷 BYO drinks + snacks
🎨 Expect to get messy - in the best way
✨ FREE Glazing Class (INCLUDED): You’ll receive a glazing CODE after your making session to use at checkout when booking your glazing class. (Come back in 2 weeks to finish your pieces! Please note you have 2 months to complete your glazing class)
Yep, that’s two classes for the price of one. Let’s spin.

title: Swimming
text:
It’s the Sunshine Coast in Spring! Surely there will be some good weather for an afternoon beach trip!
Where we go swimming will probably depend on where the accommodation is located.

title: Dancing
text: Do we go dancing or do we have a night in, yap and play games? OR would it be possible to do both? We will see…

title: Games

Everybody loves games

title: Accommodation
text:
4 People Accommodation



•THE COOLI• Family, pets & beach



About this space

The Cooli is a family friendly and pet friendly holiday apartment in a small complex of five units. Walk to the Marcoola surf beach (370m), dog friendly beach, parks, restaurants, pubs and cafes.
This is our holiday unit set up with everything we love for the perfect vacation and is yours to enjoy.
Please note, we are located right near the Airport, overhead noise will be present from planes.
15% off for 7+ nights 25% off for 28+ nights $50 Pet Fee
Check out listings for The Buddi Airbnb.
The space
Located beachside of the Sunshine Coast Airport we have a beautiful fully self-contained kitchen, open living and dining room and full laundry. Two bedrooms with ceiling fans. One bathroom with shower and separate bath, additional standalone toilet room. Both the living room and king bedroom have Smart TVs with complimentary Netflix for the guests to stream. An aircon system with cooling and heating options available lounge room area. A grassed front yard with festoon lighting, table for four and a Webber family BBQ.
Please note we provide a dog bowl for your fur babies, yard is fenced with gate access, please bring bedding as we request no dogs on beds or furniture.
Guest access
Guests will gain access via a self check in process using a coded lock box. Guests will have the whole of apartment 5 to themselves as well as a back yard with BBQ and outdoor seating.
Lock up garage parking provided. Additionally you can park on the street for free.
Access to the apartment has one little step to the door entrance, however it is a single level unit located on ground floor.
Other things to note
A few extras we have included to make your stay as enjoyable as possible;
- Pod coffee machine with complimentary pods and milk
- Coffee, tea and sugar
- Wifi
- Two smart tvs
- Netflix complimentary access
- All bed linen and pillows
- Bath towels
- Shampoo, Conditioner and body wash
- Beach towels
- Beach Cart
- Books & Games
- Dog bowl
